title: Better HeroPack Reloading
description: A mod that aims to help with reloading HeroPacks for the Fisk's Superheroes mod.
body:
**Requires [UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins)**

A mod that improves [Fisk's Superheroes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fiskheroes)' HeroPack reloading system.

### Features
* Compares your currently loaded heropacks with the server's and automatically cancels reloading if they match, allowing you to join the server instantly.
* Automatically load official server heropacks on game startup. This can be disabled in the config.
* Config option to cancel reloading while having additional local heropacks, as long as the required server packs match.
* Improves stability by fixing several fatal errors that could occur during gameplay.
